summary: The user is planning a birding trip to Costa Rica, specifically seeking recommendations for the best spots to see Quetzals and tips for increasing their chances of spotting these elusive birds. They also inquired about reputable birding tour operators, accommodation options, customized itineraries, photography gear, and useful birding apps and field guides.
